name: Killingworth

locations.address: Killingworth Police Office White Swan Centre Citadel East Killingworth Newcastle upon Tyne NE12 6SS

description: North Tyneside is a mix of urban areas combined with award-winning coastline. North Tyneside is the location of our force headquarters in Middle Engine Lane, Wallsend. There are also other police bases in North Shields and Whitley Bay.
